landing.title: Nachi3D Certify
landing.subtitle: Every Nachi3D figurine carries an embedded NFC chip and a printed certificate. Tap or scan to verify a piece.
landing.step1: Tap your phone to the chip embedded in the figurine's base, or scan the QR on the certificate card.
landing.step2: You'll land on this site, on a page unique to that piece.
landing.step3: If the page shows the piece's number, photos, and provenance, it's authentic.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Every authenticated Nachi3D piece, in one place.

stats.authenticated: {count, plural, one {# piece authenticated} other {# pieces authenticated}}

gallery.empty: Gallery in preparation. Check back soon.

verify.tamperBody: This URL did not pass our authenticity check. The chip may have been cloned or the link tampered with. If you believe this is a genuine Nachi3D piece, contact us at hello@nachi3d.com.
verify.notFoundBody: We couldn't find a Nachi3D piece for this code. Make sure you scanned a Nachi3D figurine and try again.

claim.title: Own this piece?
claim.body: Claim it to your Nachi3D account so future taps show you as the owner, and so you can transfer it cleanly if you ever resell.

modal.title: Claim this piece
modal.intro: We'll send a magic link to your email. Click it to confirm ownership — no password needed.
modal.countryHint: Two-letter code, e.g. FR, MA, US.
modal.successBody: We sent a magic link. Click it within the next hour to finish claiming this piece.

errors.validation: Check your email, display name and country code.
errors.already_claimed: This piece has just been claimed by someone else.
errors.email_failed: We couldn't send the email. Try again in a moment.

handler.expiredBody: This claim link has expired. Magic links are valid for one hour — request a new one from the verification page.
handler.invalidBody: We couldn't find this claim. The link may have been altered. Try again from the verification page.
handler.emailMismatchBody: You're signed in with a different email than the one this claim was sent to. Sign out and re-open the link.
handler.alreadyClaimedBody: This piece has just been claimed by another collector. If you believe you bought it, contact the seller for a transfer.

handler.title: Accept this transfer
handler.body: A previous owner is transferring this piece to you. Confirm to make it yours.
handler.notSignedInBody: Re-open the magic link from your email to sign in and finish accepting this transfer.
handler.invalidBody: We couldn't find this transfer. The link may have been altered.
handler.emailMismatchBody: This transfer was sent to a different email. Sign out and re-open it from the right inbox.
handler.acceptedBody: This transfer has already been accepted. The piece is in your dashboard.
handler.revokedBody: The sender revoked this transfer before you accepted it.
handler.expiredBody: Transfers are valid for 7 days. Ask the sender to start a new one.
handler.ownershipChangedBody: Ownership of this piece changed before you accepted. The transfer is no longer valid.

banners.transferAccepted: Transfer accepted — the piece is now yours.
banners.transferSent: Transfer initiated. The recipient has been emailed.
banners.adminOnly: That page is reserved for administrators.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.countryHint: Two-letter code, e.g. FR, MA, US. Leave empty to clear.

errors.validation: Country must be a two-letter code (or empty).

owned.heading: Owned pieces
owned.empty: You don't own any pieces yet. Claim one from a verification page.

transferModal.title: Transfer this piece
transferModal.intro: We'll email a one-time link to the recipient. They click it to accept — no password needed.
transferModal.successBody: We emailed the recipient. The transfer expires in 7 days unless they accept.

errors.validation: Enter a valid recipient email (and a note under 500 chars).
errors.pendingExists: A transfer is already pending for this piece. Revoke it before starting another.
errors.emailFailed: We couldn't send the email. Try again in a moment.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.comingSoon: Coming soon — Phase 2 will introduce piece registration.
admin.notAuthorized: You don't have access to the admin panel.

pieces.newSubtitle: Save as draft to upload photos, or publish straight away.
pieces.createdBanner: Piece created. Upload photos and publish when ready.
pieces.empty: No pieces yet. Click ‘New piece’ to register the first one.

form.uidLockedHint: NFC UID is locked once a piece is published.
form.showInGalleryHint: Uncheck to keep this piece off /gallery while still verifiable via /v/[uid].

photos.dragHint: Drag to reorder. The first photo is the hero.
photos.empty: No photos yet. Drag images here or click ‘Add photos’.
photos.addAfterCreate: Save the piece first, then upload photos on the edit page.

nfc.title: Write to NFC chip
nfc.body: Program this URL onto the figurine's NTAG215 chip and print the matching QR onto the certificate card.

specs.variantHint: For designs available in multiple sizes (e.g. Raze S/M/L).

danger.subtitle: Permanently delete
danger.body: Deletion is irreversible. If an NFC chip has been programmed for this piece, it will no longer verify. All photos, the cached PDF, the provenance history, and the verification logs will be lost.
danger.modalPrompt: Type the piece number ({number}) below to confirm.
danger.errorFallback: Deletion failed. The piece is unchanged.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your pieces.

errors.validation: Enter a valid email and password.

magicLink.heading: Sign in with a link
magicLink.helper: No password? We'll email you a secure sign-in link.
magicLink.success: Check your inbox — a sign-in link is on the way.

errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.generic: Couldn't send the email. Try again shortly.

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.intro: In compliance with EU and French disclosure requirements, this page identifies the editor and host of the Nachi3D Certify service.

sections.title: Editor
paragraphs: Seàn McGannon, auto-entrepreneur trading under the Nachi3D brand.
Place of business: Essaouira, Morocco.
Contact: contact@nachi3d.com.
Publication director: Seàn McGannon.

sections.title: Hosting
paragraphs: The application is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA. Vercel acts as the technical service provider for the front-end and serverless functions.
Database, authentication and file storage services are provided by Supabase Inc.

sections.title: Intellectual property
paragraphs: The Nachi3D name, the figurine designs, the photographs published on the site and the source code of this service are the property of the editor, except where a piece's license status indicates otherwise. Reproduction without prior written consent is prohibited.

sections.title: Liability
paragraphs: Nachi3D Certify is provided as an authenticity-verification utility. The editor takes reasonable care to keep the verification data accurate but offers no contractual warranty on uptime or completeness of the registry.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what data Nachi3D Certify collects when you use the service, why we collect it, and how to exercise your rights under the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.title: What we collect on verification
paragraphs: Every time a verification URL (/v/[uid]) is opened — whether by NFC tap, QR scan or direct link — we record one entry in our internal verification_logs table. The entry contains:
• the IP address-derived country code and region (read from Vercel edge headers; the raw IP itself is not stored);
• the browser user-agent string;
• the timestamp of the visit;
• whether the visitor was signed in as the owner of the piece (Phase 5+).

sections.title: Authentication data
paragraphs: Administrators sign in with an email address and password managed by Supabase Auth. The session is a strictly-necessary cookie required to access the admin panel. We do not use any tracking, analytics or third-party advertising cookies.

sections.title: Why we collect it
paragraphs: Verification logs let the editor detect cloning attempts — a single chip pinging from multiple distant countries in a short window is a strong fraud signal. The legal basis is legitimate interest under GDPR Art. 6(1)(f). Authentication data is processed on the basis of contract performance with the administrator (GDPR Art. 6(1)(b)).

sections.title: Retention
paragraphs: Verification logs are kept indefinitely for the lifetime of the corresponding piece. When a piece is permanently deleted, its logs are deleted with it via database cascade.

sections.title: Data transfers outside the EU
paragraphs: Our hosting and database providers (Vercel Inc. and Supabase Inc.) are established in the United States. Data may therefore be processed in the USA under the standard contractual clauses (SCCs) adopted by the European Commission.

sections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: Under the GDPR you may request access to, rectification of, erasure of or portability of the personal data we hold about you, and you may object to its processing. Write to contact@nachi3d.com from the email address tied to your records. We will respond within one month.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: These terms apply to anyone using Nachi3D Certify to verify a figurine. They are distinct from any sales terms applicable to a purchase on nachi3d.com.

sections.title: Purpose of the service
paragraphs: Nachi3D Certify is a public registry. Its sole purpose is to let a holder of a Nachi3D figurine confirm that the embedded NFC chip and printed certificate belong to a piece registered by the editor.

sections.title: Use of verification URLs
paragraphs: By opening a verification URL, you accept that your IP-derived country, region, user-agent and the time of your visit are logged for the purposes described in the privacy policy. The service is provided as-is, free of charge, without warranty of fitness for any particular purpose.

sections.title: No warranty on the figurines
paragraphs: Successful verification confirms that a piece is registered. It does not constitute an appraisal, an authentication for resale, or any commercial warranty on the figurine itself. Purchase terms remain governed by the sales contract between the buyer and Nachi3D.

sections.title: Acceptable use
paragraphs: Automated scraping, denial-of-service attacks and attempts to enumerate or modify the registry are prohibited. The editor reserves the right to refuse or terminate access in case of abuse.

sections.title: Governing law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Morocco. Any dispute that cannot be resolved amicably will be brought before the competent courts of Essaouira.
